---
title: "edda.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\.agents\scripts\edda.py"
loc: 119
complexity: 18
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 6.78
overall_score: 2.37
---

## Intent
The `edda.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on EddaWeaver, __init__, scan_and_transmute, _should_ignore, _transmute, _extract_title, _convert_syntax, replace_alert, _quarantine_file, synthesize_api, main. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via EddaWeaver, __init__, scan_and_transmute, _should_ignore, _transmute, _extract_title, _convert_syntax, replace_alert, _quarantine_file, synthesize_api, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 6.8/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [ast](file://ast)
- [re](file://re)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `EddaWeaver`
- `__init__`
- `scan_and_transmute`
- `_should_ignore`
- `_transmute`
- `_extract_title`
- `_convert_syntax`
- `replace_alert`
- `_quarantine_file`
- `synthesize_api`
- `main`
